reviews.review_description:
This is exactly what it looks like. It could use some varied backgrounds and more trippy visuals.

It would get five stars if one could spin the different colors around one's self. You  can't choose which color is in front of you, which leads to some very awkward reaching, especially when sitting against a wall. It's a pretty big limitation that's the only significant setback to the game currently.

developer_response.body: We really appreciate your feedback. The ball platform does not rotate because the value of VR games is that you can move and burn calories. At higher levels there are usually 3-4 lines with balls and they all move around you, no matter which way you turn. But thank you very much for the idea! Maybe we will make a menu option in future versions to enable the rotation of the ball platform. Thanks!
